description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, these sandals from ganuchi are a perfect addition to your wardrobe.UpperSynthetic twill straps on the mid foot, backfoot and crossing over on the forefootFabric inner lining for the straps for all-day comfortBuckled forefoot and midfoot straps and velcro closure for the backfoot strap to customise the FitPadded fabric patch on the inner of the back strap for added comfort to the backfootFlexible and textured PU footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU putsole with waffle pattern lugs for absolute gripshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
